name: oauth-proxy
description: Replace local Better Auth with oauth2-proxy/OIDC while keeping PostgreSQL, Drizzle, and the example items resource.

edits.find:
# Any random string >= 32 chars. Generate a real one for production: `openssl rand -hex 32`
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=dev-only-secret-change-me-please-really
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000
edits.replace:
# Local dev auth is provided by Dex + oauth2-proxy in docker-compose.yml.
DEX_PORT=5556
OAUTH_PROXY_PORT=4180

edits.find:
# Generate a real secret with: openssl rand -hex 32
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=replace-with-at-least-32-random-characters

# Public origin of the deployed app, without a trailing slash. Deploy scripts derive it
# automatically when left on this example value.
BETTER_AUTH_URL=https://cen-starter.example.com
edits.replace:
# OIDC issuer URL for your company IdP.
OAUTH2_PROXY_OIDC_ISSUER_URL=https://idp.example.com/oidc

# oauth2-proxy client registered with the IdP.
OAUTH2_PROXY_PROVIDER=oidc
OAUTH2_PROXY_CLIENT_ID=replace-with-client-id
OAUTH2_PROXY_CLIENT_SECRET=replace-with-client-secret

# Auto-generated by deploy.sh on OpenShift; set to override.
# OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=replace-with-cookie-secret

# Auto-derived by deploy.sh on OpenShift; set to override.
# OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=https://cen-starter.example.com/oauth2/callback

# Runtime wiring for the oauth2-proxy sidecar.
OAUTH2_PROXY_EMAIL_DOMAINS=*
OAUTH2_PROXY_HTTP_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0:4180
OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=http://localhost:8080
OAUTH2_PROXY_PASS_USER_HEADERS=true
OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECURE=true

edits.find:
derive_env_values() {
  local env_secret_file="$1"
  local auth_url=""
  local derived_env_file="${env_secret_file}.derived"

  auth_url=$(env_file_value BETTER_AUTH_URL "$env_secret_file" || true)
  if [[ -n "$auth_url" && "$auth_url" != "https://cen-starter.example.com" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  if [[ -z "$route_url" ]]; then
    warning "could not derive BETTER_AUTH_URL because the OpenShift route URL is unavailable"
    return
  fi

  tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")
  sed '/^BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d;/^export BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d' "$env_secret_file" > "$derived_env_file"
  printf '\nBETTER_AUTH_URL=%s\n' "$route_url" >> "$derived_env_file"
  mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_secret_file"

  derived_env_summary+=("BETTER_AUTH_URL=$route_url")
  info "derived BETTER_AUTH_URL=$route_url (set it in $ENV_FILE to override)"
}
edits.replace:
derive_env_values() {
  local env_secret_file="$1"
  local redirect_url=""
  local cookie_secret=""
  local encoded_cookie_secret=""
  local cookie_secret_status=""
  local derived_env_file="${env_secret_file}.derived"

  tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")

  redirect_url=$(env_file_value OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL "$env_secret_file" || true)
  if [[ -z "$redirect_url" || "$redirect_url" == "https://cen-starter.example.com/oauth2/callback" ]]; then
    if [[ -z "$route_url" ]]; then
      warning "could not derive OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL because the OpenShift route URL is unavailable"
    else
      redirect_url="${route_url}/oauth2/callback"
      sed '/^OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=/d;/^export OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=/d' "$env_secret_file" > "$derived_env_file"
      printf '\nOAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=%s\n' "$redirect_url" >> "$derived_env_file"
      mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_secret_file"

      derived_env_summary+=("OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=$redirect_url")
      info "derived OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=$redirect_url (set it in $ENV_FILE to override)"
    fi
  fi

  cookie_secret=$(env_file_value OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET "$env_secret_file" || true)
  if [[ -z "$cookie_secret" || "$cookie_secret" == "replace-with-cookie-secret" ]]; then
    encoded_cookie_secret=$(oc get secret "$APP_SECRET" -n "$namespace" -o 'jsonpath={.data.OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET}' 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [[ -n "$encoded_cookie_secret" ]]; then
      cookie_secret=$(read_secret_key "$APP_SECRET" OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET)
    fi

    if [[ -n "$cookie_secret" && "$cookie_secret" != "replace-with-cookie-secret" ]]; then
      cookie_secret_status="reused"
      info "reusing existing OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET from the $APP_SECRET secret"
    else
      need_command openssl
      cookie_secret=$(openssl rand -hex 16)
      cookie_secret_status="generated"
      info "generated OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET (set it in $ENV_FILE to override)"
    fi

    sed '/^OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=/d;/^export OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=/d' "$env_secret_file" > "$derived_env_file"
    printf '\nOAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=%s\n' "$cookie_secret" >> "$derived_env_file"
    mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_secret_file"

    derived_env_summary+=("OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=<$cookie_secret_status>")
  fi
}

ibmcloud ce application update --name "$APP_NAME" \
      --build-source . \
      --build-dockerfile infra/deploy/Dockerfile \
      --visibility project

ibmcloud ce application create --name "$APP_NAME" \
      --build-source . \
      --build-dockerfile infra/deploy/Dockerfile \
      --image "$image" \
      --registry-secret "$REGISTRY_SECRET" \
      --port 8080 \
      --env-from-secret "$APP_SECRET" \
      --min-scale 1 \
      --cpu 0.5 \
      --memory 1G \
      --visibility project

edits.find:
derive_env_values() {
  local env_file="$1"
  local auth_url=""
  local derived_env_file="${env_file}.derived"

  auth_url=$(env_file_value BETTER_AUTH_URL "$env_file" || true)
  if [[ -n "$auth_url" && "$auth_url" != "https://cen-starter.example.com" && "$auth_url" != "https://pending.invalid" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  if [[ -z "$app_url" ]]; then
    app_url=$(application_url "$APP_NAME")
  fi

  if [[ -z "$app_url" ]]; then
    if [[ "$finalizing_derived_urls" == "true" ]]; then
      warning "could not derive BETTER_AUTH_URL because the Code Engine application URL is unavailable"
      return
    fi
    # First deploy: no application URL exists yet, but the backend refuses to boot without
    # a valid BETTER_AUTH_URL. Seed a placeholder so the first revision becomes ready;
    # finalize_derived_urls swaps in the real URL immediately after.
    tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")
    sed '/^BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d;/^export BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d' "$env_file" > "$derived_env_file"
    printf '\nBETTER_AUTH_URL=%s\n' "https://pending.invalid" >> "$derived_env_file"
    mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_file"
    info "seeded placeholder BETTER_AUTH_URL for the first boot; the real URL is derived after the first deploy"
    return
  fi

  tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")
  sed '/^BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d;/^export BETTER_AUTH_URL=/d' "$env_file" > "$derived_env_file"
  printf '\nBETTER_AUTH_URL=%s\n' "$app_url" >> "$derived_env_file"
  mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_file"

  derived_env_summary+=("BETTER_AUTH_URL=$app_url")
  info "derived BETTER_AUTH_URL=$app_url (set it in $ENV_FILE to override)"
}
edits.replace:
read_code_engine_secret_key() {
  local key="$1"
  local secret_yaml=""
  local encoded_value=""

  secret_yaml=$(ibmcloud ce secret get --name "$APP_SECRET" --output yaml 2>/dev/null || true)
  encoded_value=$(printf '%s\n' "$secret_yaml" \
    | sed -n "s/^[[:space:]]*${key}:[[:space:]]*//p" \
    | head -n 1)
  encoded_value=$(strip_matching_quotes "$encoded_value")

  if [[ -z "$encoded_value" ]]; then
    return 1
  fi

  printf '%s' "$encoded_value" | base64_decode
}

private_application_url() {
  local output=""
  local private_url=""
  local project_subdomain=""

  output=$(ibmcloud ce application get --name "$APP_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true)
  private_url=$(printf '%s\n' "$output" \
    | grep -Eo 'https?://[^[:space:]]+\.svc\.cluster\.local' \
    | head -n 1 || true)

  if [[ -n "$private_url" ]]; then
    printf '%s' "$private_url"
    return
  fi

  output=$(ibmcloud ce project current 2>/dev/null || true)
  project_subdomain=$(printf '%s\n' "$output" \
    | awk 'tolower($1) ~ /^subdomain/ { print $NF; exit }')
  project_subdomain=$(strip_matching_quotes "$project_subdomain")

  if [[ -z "$project_subdomain" ]]; then
    error "could not read the project subdomain needed for the private '$APP_NAME' URL"
    exit 1
  fi

  printf 'http://%s.%s.svc.cluster.local' "$APP_NAME" "$project_subdomain"
}

ensure_oauth_proxy_application() {
  local proxy_app_name="$1"

  if ibmcloud ce application get --name "$proxy_app_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    info "Updating public Code Engine application '$proxy_app_name'."
    ibmcloud ce application update --name "$proxy_app_name" \
      --image quay.io/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy:v7.7.1 \
      --port http1:4180 \
      --env-from-secret "$APP_SECRET" \
      --min-scale 1 \
      --cpu 0.25 \
      --memory 0.5G \
      --visibility public \
      --probe-live type=http \
      --probe-live path=/ping \
      --probe-live port=4180 \
      --probe-ready type=http \
      --probe-ready path=/ping \
      --probe-ready port=4180
  else
    info "Creating public Code Engine application '$proxy_app_name'."
    ibmcloud ce application create --name "$proxy_app_name" \
      --image quay.io/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy:v7.7.1 \
      --port http1:4180 \
      --env-from-secret "$APP_SECRET" \
      --min-scale 1 \
      --cpu 0.25 \
      --memory 0.5G \
      --visibility public \
      --probe-live type=http \
      --probe-live path=/ping \
      --probe-live port=4180 \
      --probe-ready type=http \
      --probe-ready path=/ping \
      --probe-ready port=4180
  fi
}

derive_env_values() {
  local env_file="$1"
  local proxy_app_name="${APP_NAME}-oauth-proxy"
  local cookie_secret=""
  local existing_cookie_secret=""
  local cookie_secret_status=""
  local proxy_url=""
  local upstream_url=""
  local redirect_url=""
  local current_redirect_url=""
  local current_upstream_url=""
  local derived_env_file="${env_file}.derived"

  derived_app_names=("$APP_NAME" "$proxy_app_name")

  cookie_secret=$(env_file_value OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET "$env_file" || true)
  if [[ -z "$cookie_secret" || "$cookie_secret" == "replace-with-cookie-secret" ]]; then
    existing_cookie_secret=$(read_code_engine_secret_key OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET || true)

    if [[ -n "$existing_cookie_secret" && "$existing_cookie_secret" != "replace-with-cookie-secret" ]]; then
      cookie_secret="$existing_cookie_secret"
      cookie_secret_status="reused"
      info "reusing existing OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET from the $APP_SECRET secret"
    else
      need_command openssl
      cookie_secret=$(openssl rand -hex 16)
      cookie_secret_status="generated"
      info "generated OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET"
    fi

    tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")
    sed '/^OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=/d;/^export OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=/d' \
      "$env_file" > "$derived_env_file"
    printf '\nOAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=%s\n' "$cookie_secret" >> "$derived_env_file"
    mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_file"
    derived_env_summary+=("OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=<$cookie_secret_status>")
  fi

  if [[ "$finalizing_derived_urls" == "true" ]]; then
    ensure_oauth_proxy_application "$proxy_app_name"
  fi

  proxy_url=$(application_url "$proxy_app_name")
  if [[ -z "$proxy_url" ]]; then
    if [[ "$finalizing_derived_urls" == "true" ]]; then
      warning "could not derive oauth2-proxy URLs because its public application URL is unavailable"
    fi
    return
  fi

  upstream_url=$(private_application_url)
  redirect_url="${proxy_url}/oauth2/callback"
  current_redirect_url=$(env_file_value OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL "$env_file" || true)
  current_upstream_url=$(env_file_value OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS "$env_file" || true)
  app_url="$proxy_url"

  if [[ "$current_redirect_url" == "$redirect_url" && "$current_upstream_url" == "$upstream_url" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  tmp_files+=("$derived_env_file")
  sed '/^OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=/d;/^export OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=/d;/^OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=/d;/^export OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=/d' \
    "$env_file" > "$derived_env_file"
  printf '\nOAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=%s\nOAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=%s\n' \
    "$redirect_url" "$upstream_url" >> "$derived_env_file"
  mv "$derived_env_file" "$env_file"

  derived_env_summary+=("OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=$redirect_url")
  derived_env_summary+=("OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=$upstream_url")
  info "derived OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL=$redirect_url (Code Engine wiring overrides $ENV_FILE)"
  info "derived OAUTH2_PROXY_UPSTREAMS=$upstream_url (Code Engine wiring overrides $ENV_FILE)"
}

edits.find:
print_summary() {
  local derived_value=""

  if [[ -z "$app_url" ]]; then
    app_url=$(application_url "$APP_NAME")
  fi

  info ""
  info "Deployment summary"
  if [[ -n "$app_url" ]]; then
    info "Application: $app_url"
  else
    info "Application: URL not found"
  fi
  info "Database: external DATABASE_URL from $ENV_FILE"

  if ((${#derived_env_summary[@]} > 0)); then
    for derived_value in "${derived_env_summary[@]}"; do
      info "Derived env: $derived_value"
    done
  fi
}
edits.replace:
print_summary() {
  local derived_value=""

  if [[ -z "$app_url" ]]; then
    app_url=$(application_url "${APP_NAME}-oauth-proxy")
  fi

  info ""
  info "Deployment summary"
  if [[ -n "$app_url" ]]; then
    info "Application: $app_url"
  else
    info "Application: URL not found"
  fi
  info "Main app: $APP_NAME (project-only; reached through ${APP_NAME}-oauth-proxy)"
  info "Database: external DATABASE_URL from $ENV_FILE"

  if ((${#derived_env_summary[@]} > 0)); then
    for derived_value in "${derived_env_summary[@]}"; do
      info "Derived env: $derived_value"
    done
  fi
}
